active_sales.name: Steam Summer Sale 2026
active_sales.note: The event runs June 25 - July 9, 2026, meaning it ends in just 4 days — last real window to push urgency on discounted Steam keys before the sale disappears.

active_sales.name: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced pre-order bonus (Blackbeard's Crimson Pack)
active_sales.platform: PS5 / Xbox / PC (Steam, Epic, Ubisoft Connect)
active_sales.note: Pre-ordering before the July 9 launch nets buyers a bonus cosmetic/weapon pack, giving loot.tn a short pre-order upsell window.

new_releases.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
new_releases.platforms: PS5, Xbox Series X/S, PC (Steam/Epic/Ubisoft Connect)
new_releases.why_it_matters: A remake of the beloved 2013 pirate classic launching in just 4 days; console launch time is midnight local, PC/GeForce Now launch is 15:00 BST/16:00 CEST on July 9, making it a strong same-day key-sale opportunity.

new_releases.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved
new_releases.why_it_matters: One of only two 'mega remakes' headlining July, alongside Black Flag Resynced, per PC Gamer's July release roundup — a good Xbox/PC key to line up ahead of launch.

new_releases.title: Grand Theft Auto VI
new_releases.platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S (no PC date yet)
new_releases.why_it_matters: Take-Two has locked the November 19, 2026 date into official FY2027 guidance of $8-8.2 billion in net bookings, and confirmed the standard edition price at $79.99 — hype and pre-order search traffic will keep climbing through summer even though launch is months away.

streamer_trends.why_it_matters: GTA V is currently the #3 most-watched game on Twitch with 70,236 average viewers, riding a wave of renewed interest ahead of GTA 6 — loot.tn's 'GTA V Enhanced (PC) - Rockstar Key' is a direct, in-stock tie-in.

MECCHA CHAMELEON is currently the #7 most-watched category on Twitch with over 50,000 average viewers, and loot.tn already stocks its Steam Key — this should be front-and-center, not buried in 'derniers ajouts'.

streamer_trends.platform: Twitch/YouTube (huge Francophone reach relevant to Tunisian audience)
streamer_trends.why_it_matters: Squeezie's stream history includes ARC Raiders, aligning directly with loot.tn's active 'Arc Raiders (PC) - Steam Key + Compte' promo already discounted on the homepage.

After an extended hiatus, Kai Cenat (one of Twitch's most-followed streamers) has teased a stream for July 6, 2026 — whatever game he plays (historically Fortnite, GTA, COD) could spike demand overnight, so loot.tn should monitor and react fast with social posts.

recommendations.action: Add a homepage countdown banner: 'Steam Summer Sale se termine le 9 juillet!' pushing already-discounted Steam keys (Arc Raiders, Gothic 1 Remake, F1 25, EA SPORTS FC 26) with urgency copy.
recommendations.reason: The Steam Summer Sale ends July 9, 2026, giving only a few days left — urgency messaging on existing discounted SKUs can lift conversion before the window closes.

recommendations.action: List Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced (PS5/Xbox/Steam/Ubisoft key) for pre-order/launch-day sale now, timed to the July 9 midnight console / 15:00 BST PC launch.
recommendations.reason: The game launches July 9, 2026 on PS5, Xbox and PC, and is one of the two headline 'mega remakes' of the month — being live before launch captures pre-launch search traffic.

recommendations.action: Update the GTA VI PRE-ORDER listing to clearly state the confirmed release date (November 19, 2026) and reference the confirmed $79.99 standard price, adding a countdown widget.
recommendations.reason: Take-Two has confirmed November 19, 2026 as the firm date with pricing 'in line with current AAA console pricing,' and clarity here builds trust and reduces pre-order confusion/refund requests months ahead of launch.

recommendations.action: Feature 'MECCHA CHAMELEON Steam Key' more prominently (hero carousel, not just 'derniers ajouts'), with messaging like 'Le jeu que tout Twitch regarde en ce moment.'
recommendations.reason: MECCHA CHAMELEON is currently the #7 most-watched category on Twitch, and loot.tn already sells its key but under-features it on the homepage.

recommendations.action: Cross-promote 'GTA V Enhanced (PC) - Rockstar Key' with a 'Get hyped for GTA 6 — replay GTA V now' campaign, bundling with the GTA VI pre-order tile.
recommendations.reason: GTA V is currently the #3 most-watched game on Twitch (70K+ avg viewers) driven by GTA 6 anticipation, and loot.tn already stocks the GTA V Enhanced key at a discount.

recommendations.action: Prep and list a Halo: Campaign Evolved Xbox/PC key page ahead of its late-July launch.
recommendations.reason: Halo: Campaign Evolved is one of July's two flagship remakes and will draw significant Xbox/PC key demand around its late-July release.

recommendations.action: Set up a social-listening alert for Kai Cenat's rumored July 6 comeback stream and be ready to fast-post a matching key/account promo if he plays a title in loot.tn's catalog (Fortnite, GTA, COD, Valorant).
recommendations.reason: Kai Cenat teased a stream for July 6, 2026 after a long hiatus, and his streams historically cause massive spikes in whatever game he plays.

site_notes: Homepage still lists 'GTA VI PRE-ORDER' without a release date — since Rockstar's confirmed launch is November 19, 2026 (PS5/Xbox only, no PC), add explicit date/platform clarity plus a countdown to build trust and reduce confusion. The Steam Summer Sale ends July 9, so existing discount tiles (Arc Raiders, Gothic 1 Remake, F1 25, EA FC 26) should get urgency badges. MECCHA CHAMELEON and GTA V Enhanced are both riding real Twitch trend spikes and are already in loot.tn's catalog but are under-promoted relative to their trending status — bumping them into the top promo carousel is low-effort, high-impact. Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced and Halo: Campaign Evolved should be added/expanded as new SKUs to catch July's two biggest remake launches.
